hero.tagline: Kolhapur's trusted local marketplace. Instantly hire verified domestic help or list your services to find local jobs.
hero.hire_desc: Find and hire verified cooks, cleaners, nannies, elderly care assistants, laundry helpers, and drivers.
hero.work_title: I Want to Work / Find Jobs
hero.work_desc: Register as a professional helper, define your work schedules, list your service rates, and connect with households.
hero.step_hire_1_desc: Select from cooking, cleaning, child care, or driver services.
hero.step_hire_2_desc: Compare local verified workers based on skills, ratings, and bios.
hero.step_hire_3_desc: Confirm timetables, contact directly, and pay securely online.
hero.step_work_1_desc: Complete bio details, service skills, and verification records.
hero.step_work_2_desc: Accept or decline instant booking offers right from your panel.
hero.step_work_3_desc: Complete daily gigs and withdraw straight to your savings account.

services.title: Comprehensive Home Support
services.subtitle: From daily cooking to specialized childcare, find verified professionals for all your household needs.
services.cooking_desc: Professional cooks for daily meals, special occasions, or dietary needs
services.cleaning_desc: Thorough cleaning services for homes of all sizes
services.childcare_desc: Experienced nannies and babysitters for your children
services.eldercare_desc: Compassionate care for elderly family members
services.driving_desc: Reliable drivers for daily commute or special trips

cta.title: Ready to Grow Your Career?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who trust RoozgaarSetu for their career growth. Get started in minutes!
cta.support_desc: Our team is available 24/7 to assist you with any queries or urgent requirements.

workers.title: Find Verified Workers

workers.noWorkersDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters to find more results.

booking.selectWorkerDesc: Please select a worker from our listings to book their services.
